productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Response Cushion White Blue Shoe
description: HIGH TECH MACHINE, SIMPLY DESIGNED When hardcore durability meets soft, cushioned touch, you get what's called the adidas Response Cushion 19. An absolute dream-come-true for a runner, the adidas Response Cushion 19 boasts of an increased cushioning all around the foot making it a pleasure for the feet. With a meshed material on the inside and outside of the upper, the feet are provided with ample breathability and ventilation in these shoes. Now that the feet are safe from getting heavy with sweat and chances of infection ruled out in these shoes, Adidas added on its trademark three stripes in the form of synthetic overlays on the upper, anchoring the laces and keeping them locked in place for enhanced midfoot function and support.   Stability at its best Weighing all of just about 349 grams for men's shoes and 281 grams for women's shoes, the Adidas Response Cushion 19 features a Torsion system in the midsole for enhanced stability that ensures a lesser side-to-side foot movement and more efficient heelstrike to forefoot motion. In fact, most users of the Adidas Response Cushion 19 vouch for its midfoot support system that makes this shoe absolutely energy efficient and comfortable. A high tech running machine hidden under a simple design, the durability of the Adidas Response Cushion 19 is driven by the trademark AdiWEAR system in the outsole. This outsole is made of tough rubber that not only enhances shoe life, but also promotes traction at its best. As a cherry on the icing, the Adidas Response Cushion 19 shoe has also employed an adiPRENE system that provides ultimate cushioning and impact protection, retaining foot propulsion keeping the runner moving forward without wasting energy unnecessarily. If running is what gives you the greatest pleasure, then grab for yourself this Adidas Response Cushion 19, add on an iPod to your enjoyment and enjoy long runs in the wilderness.Wash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine wash
